title: lithocardium galeottianum
intro: Lithocardium galeottianum is a flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as a source of cardenolides, a group of cardiac glycosides. The medicinal properties of Lithocardium galeottianum have been used to treat various heart-related conditions due to its ability to increase the force of heart contractions and slow heart rate. The health benefits of this plant include reducing blood pressure and alleviating symptoms of heart failure. Lithocardium galeottianum is typically prepared as a tincture or extract for medicinal use, and its herbal preparations have been utilized in traditional medicine for centuries.
